case_title: JUAN ALMARAZ RUIZ VS. STEVE KASS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RUSSIAN FLOOR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, JUAN ALMARAZ AS TO DEFENDANT STEVE KASS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RUSSIAN FLOOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, JUAN ALMARAZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVE KASS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RUSSIAN FLOOR $5,652.21 PRINCIPAL, $40.14 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,897.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
